issues.detail: Instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases.
Skill assumes macOS for iOS builds, limiting cross-platform applicability.

scenarios.name: iOS TestFlight beta lane with auto build number and Slack notification
scenarios.rationale: Treatment used the documented build_app, upload_to_testflight with skip_waiting_for_build_processing, and the slack action with slack_url: ENV["SLACK_WEBHOOK"]; baseline used legacy gym/pilot aliases and a raw curl call instead of the slack action.

scenarios.name: Android staged rollout promoting internal to production at 10%
scenarios.rationale: Both used upload_to_play_store with track, track_promote_to, and rollout: "0.1" correctly; treatment added context that no aab is needed since this is a promotion, giving it a slight edge.
